turns.content: PhD Student Task: You are a researcher. Report back: (1) your agent name, (2) current timestamp, (3) a brief summary of what tools you have access to, (4) the current working directory, and (5) any environment variables that start with OPENCODE_. This is a live UAT test — do not overthink, just report facts.
